items.name_en: Kelly Elan, Goat leather, 27cm, 18 Grey, Gold buckle
items.name_cn:
Kelly Elan, Goat leather, 27cm, 18 Grey, Gold buckle
The first true crossbody in the Kelly family, with no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length, a high daily usage rate~
Exquisite and elegant slender silhouette, kid goat leather paired with full vintage vibes, perfect storage. The strap length and crossbody carry method are very nice!

Kelly elan Cognac·Gold
Imported cowhide, cross-grain, hand-waxed thread, full metal hardware

items.name_cn:
Small KL Multi-color Patchwork
Tired of the classic KL?❗️ Need a new twist for your outfit🤔️ Don't underestimate it! It has a small side pocket on the back. Small bag, big potential☯️, perfect for passports, beauty cards, and small card holders😝

items.name_en: kelly2424 mini 21cm Evercolor/swift, strongly recommended. Young retro vibe, not only beautiful but also easy to handle in various ways (handheld, single shoulder, crossbody, backpack). The backpack strap style is super practical with ample capacity. Exquisite, elegant, and casual, each style presents a different look.
